metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline deliverables are present and the memo provides clear packet-level calculations and a PASS gate decision. However the verifier flagged internal inconsistencies and weakly supported claims: (1) the grader states spreadsheet parsing was not performed (openpyxl unavailable) yet semantic_score fields are populated - remove or document the basis for semantic scoring; (2) claims that sensitivity tests and workbook formulas were 'executed' are only supported by the memo text because the .xlsx could not be programmatically opened - provide independent workbook-level evidence (exported CSVs or formula dump) or enable parse capability; (3) trace normalization errors and/or incomplete agent_trace.json were observed - complete and validate the trace artifact. Addressing these items will make the attempt auditable and verifiable.
